reasoning: Peer reference sheet is classic Denzi dungeon tileset: dark stone grays, black outlines at 1px, muted teal accents, dark reds and browns, dense pixel art dithering, top-left light source with subtle shadow, very high detail density per tile, gritty non-cute JRPG aesthetic.
